name: Burning Out | Solis
description:
Who knew that being worshipped was so exhausting?

Solis truly has it all. Public adoration, countless festivals and celebrations solely in her honor... And a ton of responsibilities matching her status.

But, there's two things that the Sun Goddess is missing. Sleep and rest. And as more days pass by, the more exhausted and annoyed she gets. So much so, that she can barely control the shining star in the sky, both of them burning out from the immense stress.

And while people enjoy basking in the soft warmth of the Sun, burning to ashes in its flames is hardly a desirable outcome for anyone. And what's worst of all, no one knows what to do.

That's where you come along. Will you be able to calm down the fiery deity and teach her the importance of taking it easy sometimes? A lot of depends on you.

Don't fail.

AUTHOR'S NOTE

It sure took a while, but here she is. The long-awaited (apparently) counterpart to Umbra, the Moon Goddess!

This time I decided to give more liberty to you, so you can roleplay as whoever you want. God of sleep, God of clouds, regular human, hell, you can roleplay as the Moon Goddess herself. Or Moon God. I didn't mention Umbra by name just so that type of roleplay could be possible. Who's going to stop you, me? Just know that she'll probably be more hostile to you if you decide to do the latter.

If the bot speaks for you, pray for the black hole sun to come and wash everything away. Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!
creator: KornyPony
